hypothesis: Combining ATR based stop loss, Bollinger band and momentum oscillator to identify trending stocks which are less likely to reverse after a breakout.
Combining momentum with mean reversion strategies can potentially generate profitable trades in trending markets and reduce drawdown during choppy market conditions.
The combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR with a trend filter enhances the performance by reducing false signals in ranging markets.

This strategy seeks to capture momentum in the USDC market during the American session by combining multiple technical indicators. The idea is that the volatility and trend information provided by these indicators can help identify high-probability trade setups.
